title: gagea stellaris
intro: Gagea stellaris, also known as the starry gagea or winter aconite, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family that grows in the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gagea stellaris include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are typically dried and used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
